utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh , wow ! I should get going . I ... I got a date tonight .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You know that girl I told you about who lives up in Poughkeepsie ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah , this is someone else I meet , and I ... I can not decide between the two of them .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You know the one from Poughkeepsie , even though she is a two hour train ride away , is really pretty , really smart , and ... and a lot of fun .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: But this other girl , well , she lives right uptown .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You know she is , well she is ... she is just as pretty , I guess she is smart , she is not fun .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: If she is no fun , why do you want to date her at all ?

emotion_cause.span: 9_If she is no fun , why do you want to date her at all ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Well , I ... I want to give her another chance , you know ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: And , at the end of the date , the other time , she ... she said something that was ... if she was kidding was very funny .

emotion_cause.span: 12_she ... she said something that was ... if she was kidding was very funny .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: On the other hand , if she was not kidding , she is not fun , she is stupid , and kind of a racist .

emotion_cause.span: 13_if she was not kidding , she is not fun , she is stupid , and kind of a racist .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hey ! Ooh , how was your first day working at the restaurant ?

emotion_cause.span: 15_your first day working at the restaurant
